title: 3 Volcano Facts That Sound Fake

segments.text: There is a volcano on Earth so massive it could swallow entire countries.
And it is not the only thing hiding under the surface.
Volcanoes created most of the air we breathe and the oceans we swim in.
Some erupt with lava hotter than twelve hundred degrees Celsius.
On other moons, there are volcanoes that erupt ice instead of fire.
And right now, around twenty volcanoes are erupting somewhere on Earth.
Follow for more facts that sound fake but are real.

description: Volcanoes made our air and oceans, and some erupt ICE. Earth is wild. Follow for daily facts that sound fake but are real!
